signals.headline: Cavaliers lead Raptors 2-0 in Eastern Conference first-round series after 115-105 Game 2 win** | NO | HIGH confidence[3]
signals.raw:
Cavaliers lead Raptors 2-0 in Eastern Conference first-round series after 115-105 Game 2 win** | NO | HIGH confidence[3]

Donovan Mitchell scored 30 points, James Harden added 28, and Evan Mobley contributed 25 points with 8 rebounds to secure Cleveland's victory on Monday, marking their second straight win in the series[3]. This result shifts series prediction markets toward Cavaliers advancement
matched_markets: NBA Playoffs: Who Will Win Series? - Raptors vs. Cavaliers
